svg.title: Pulldown — Features, Formats, Tech Stack, Getting Started
svg.desc: Full reference infographic for the Pulldown open-source video downloader and converter.
svg.text: FREE · OPEN SOURCE · VIDEO DOWNLOADER & CONVERTER
Highest quality downloads: 4K VP9, AV1, H.264, HEVC
Format picker: resolution, codec, audio bitrate per download
Download queue: parallel downloads · pause / resume / cancel
In-app browser: browse platforms, hit "Download This"
Any format ⇆ any format: mp4, mkv, mov, webm, mp3, flac, opus, gif…
Quality presets: High · Balanced · Small File · fully custom
Advanced mode: live ffmpeg command preview
See exactly what runs before it runs
100% local: files never leave your machine
Replaceable engines: yt-dlp and ffmpeg are swappable sidecars
Engine update notifications: you decide when to update
Library view: browse and play downloaded and converted files
If ffmpeg supports it, Pulldown can convert it.
Ships with pinned versions of yt-dlp and ffmpeg
App notifies when a new version is detected
You choose when to update — no silent replacements
Settings → Engine Management → Check for Updates
npm install && npm run tauri dev

Pulldown is a GUI tool. It does not host, distribute, or cache any copyrighted content. You are solely responsible for how you use this tool. Not affiliated with YouTube, Google, or any media platform.
